metadata_findings.detail: Activation event 'onCommand:extension.pickNativeProcess': Runs when command triggered - user/shortcut driven
Activation event 'onCommand:extension.pickRemoteNativeProcess': Runs when command triggered - user/shortcut driven
Activation event 'workspaceContains:/.vscode/c_cpp_properties.json': Auto-runs when repo opened - can trigger on any workspace
Contributes 'taskDefinitions': Can define tasks that run shell commands
Contributes 'debuggers': Can inspect running processes and variables (run arbitrary programs)
Contributes 'walkthroughs': Can present guided flows to users
